personal_profile.headline: Senior Frontend Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Frontend engineer focused on design systems, accessibility, experimentation, and customer-facing product delivery.

bullets.text: Built React and TypeScript onboarding flows that increased activation 21% and improved accessibility audit scores.
Partnered with product and design stakeholders to run A/B experiments for pricing and onboarding UX.
Owned a shared design system used across customer-facing web applications.
